items.title: Paper accepted in Statistics and Probability Letters
items.content: Our paper 'Drift parameter estimation for the noisy Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process driven by a Rosenblatt process' (with H. Araya and F. Plaza-Vega) has been accepted for publication in Statistics and Probability Letters.

items.title: CLAPEM 17
items.content: I presented the talk 'Spatial copula models for non-gaussian random fields' at the 17th Latin American Congress of Probability and Mathematical Statistics (CLAPEM 17).

items.title: Paper accepted in Statistical Papers
items.content: Our paper 'Drift parameter identification for the Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process driven by Ornstein-Uhlenbeck with small General Gaussian noise' has been accepted for publication in Statistical Papers.

items.title: Joined the Department of Statistics
items.content: I joined the Department of Statistics at Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile as an Assistant Professor.
